description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a gable roof and a prominent front entrance featuring double doors with frosted glass panels. The exterior is clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving it a natural, earthy appearance. On one side, there is a large rectangular window divided into multiple panes, while the rear features a smaller window and a protruding box-like structure. A wooden porch with a railing extends from one side, providing an outdoor space elevated above a cracked earth base. The roof is steeply pitched and includes a single chimney, suggesting a fireplace inside. The cabin sits on a rectangular plot with a stone-textured ground surface.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a gable roof, front double doors, large side window, and a wooden porch on a stone-textured base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double doors, gable roof, and the start of the side porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the wooden porch and the chimney on the roof.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying a large multi-pane window and the porch entrance.
description_view_3: Rear view with a small window and a box-like protrusion beneath the gable roof.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with a single chimney and moderate overhangs, constructed from what appears to be wooden or composite shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: One large rectangular multi-pane window on the side, one small square window at the rear, both symmetrically placed on their respective facades
attribute_door_placement: One set of double doors centered on the front facade beneath the gable
